name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that includes disparaging certain groups, such as childless individuals and immigrants. He has made numerous inflammatory statements, including suggesting that childless people are "sociopathic" and should be taxed at a higher rate, and falsely claiming that Haitian migrants are eating pets. Vance has also shown a willingness to spread misinformation and create false narratives to further his own agenda, as evidenced by his admission to "creating stories" to get media attention. Additionally, Vance has taken extreme stances on issues such as abortion, gender-affirming care, and diversity programs, and has expressed a desire to undermine the authority of federal judges and institutions. Overall, Vance's actions and statements reveal a character that is divisive, intolerant, and willing to use misinformation to achieve his goals.

entries.fact: JD Vance said elite tech crowds wielded 'political-financial power in combination with a certain condescension'.
Our Ohio Renewal's biggest accomplishment, sending psychiatrist Sally Satel to Ohio's Appalachian region, was 'tainted' by ties between Satel, her employer, and Purdue Pharma.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, spent more on 'management services' than on programs to fight opioid abuse in its first year.
JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'.
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
JD Vance opposes abortion, including in cases of rape.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance proposed a federal ban on gender-transition care for minors.
JD Vance and Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said that parents should have more voting power than non-parents, but later backtracked from this suggestion.
JD Vance opposes continued American military aid to Ukraine during the ongoing Russian invasion and prefers a negotiated peace.
JD Vance argued that the country's largest and most powerful institutions have united against the right and called for a 'de-woke-ification program', even if the courts say it is illegal.
JD Vance has a history of disparaging people without kids
Vance bashed teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children
JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' in response to her criticism of Donald Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery

JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing 'to create stories so that the American media actually pays attention ... we're creating a story, meaning we're creating the American media focusing on it'

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'
JD Vance said that a child was murdered by a Haitian migrant who had no right to be in the country, despite the child's death being an accidental collision between vehicles
JD Vance shares social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, city refutes it
Vance Sticks By Pet-Eating Claims and Says He's Willing to 'Create Stories'
JD Vance wrote that 'judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power' in response to federal judges issuing temporary rulings against Trump administration actions

JD Vance accused Zelenskyy of showing a propaganda tour of Ukraine and asked if he had ever offered thanks to President Trump, despite Zelenskyy starting the conversation by saying 'Thank you so much' to Trump.

JD Vance incorrectly claimed that Zelenskyy went to Pennsylvania and campaigned for the opposition in October 2024, when in fact Zelenskyy had visited a factory to thank workers producing ammunition for Ukraine.

JD Vance lamented that the 'globalist economy' had caused the United States to 'borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture', and referred to Chinese peasants in a derogatory manner
